description:
This image is a composite visualization showing the distribution of eight Level 1 land cover classes and a "No Data" category, by area in hectares (HA) and percentage (%), within the Natura 2000 Area of Interest (AoI) and its buffer zone across Europe for the reference years 2006, 2012, and 2018. The top portion is a data table, followed by a horizontal layered bar chart visualizing the same data.

The data table is structured as follows:

| CLASSES                             | 1 (Urban)   | 2 (Cropland) | 3 (Woodland and forest) | 4 (Grassland) | 5 (Heathland and scrub) | 6 (Open spaces with little or no vegetation) | 7 (Wetland) | 8 (Water)   | 0 (No Data) |
|:------------------------------------|:------------|:-------------|:------------------------|:--------------|:------------------------|:---------------------------------------------|:------------|:------------|:------------|
| **AREA (HA)**                       |             |              |                         |               |                         |                                              |             |             |             |
| 2006                                | 2,815,009   | 15,415,698   | 24,665,098              | 11,270,402    | 4,689,384               | 1,795,959                                    | 735,350     | 1,792,739   | 2,457       |
| 2012                                | 2,889,208   | 15,393,883   | 24,683,118              | 11,207,789    | 4,656,799               | 1,816,606                                    | 730,511     | 1,804,084   | 97          |
| 2018                                | 2,940,737   | 15,430,349   | 24,698,560              | 11,121,261    | 4,643,509               | 1,808,837                                    | 728,157     | 1,810,686   | 0           |
| **AREA (%)**                        |             |              |                         |               |                         |                                              |             |             |             |
| 2006                                | 4.46%       | 24.40%       | 39.04%                  | 17.84%        | 7.42%                   | 2.84%                                        | 1.16%       | 2.84%       | 0.00%       |
| 2012                                | 4.57%       | 24.36%       | 39.07%                  | 17.74%        | 7.37%                   | 2.88%                                        | 1.16%       | 2.86%       | 0.00%       |
| 2018                                | 4.65%       | 24.42%       | 39.09%                  | 17.60%        | 7.35%                   | 2.86%                                        | 1.15%       | 2.87%       | 0.00%       |

The horizontal layered bar chart visually represents the area changes for each class from 2006 to 2018. The X-axis represents Area (HA) ranging from 0 to 25,000,000 hectares. The Y-axis lists the land cover classes: URBAN, CROPLAND, WOODLAND AND FOREST, GRASSLAND, HEATHLAND AND SCRUB, OPEN SPACES WITH LITTLE OR NO VEGETATION, WETLAND, WATER, and NO DATA. For each class, three overlaid bars show the area in 2006, 2012, and 2018, with the 2018 bar typically being the longest or shortest depending on the trend, showing the net change.

Key trends observed:
- **Woodland and forest** is the largest class, showing a continuous increase from 24,665,098 HA
